headline: UHS, George Washington University ink deal to stabilize struggling physician group
summary: UHS will establish a new nonprofit to absorb financial responsibility of GW University’s debt-ridden physician practice group. Executives told Healthcare Dive the deal should help stabilize those clinical operations in the D.C. region.
